summary: Comprehensive testing of Field Revenue Intelligence System v3.0.0 - All 34 backend API tests passed (100%), Frontend UI tests passed for Admin and Worker flows

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed

passed_tests: Campaign Creation with auto-generated coupon codes (prefix + serial)
Get Campaign Coupons (verified proper code formatting)
Coupon Sale with GPS and customer details
critical_code_review_comments: DialogContent components missing aria-describedby for accessibility - minor improvement
seed_data_creation: Test campaigns created with prefixes TEST*, UITST. Test areas created in Mumbai, Maharashtra.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested and working: Campaign Management with auto-generated coupon codes (prefix + serial), New Coupon Sale Flow (code validation → photo → GPS → confirm), Worker Ledger (auto-tracks sales, advances, expenses, net payable), Expense Module (photo required for >₹100), Admin Worker Control (create/disable/reset password/add advance), Admin Dashboard Stats, Inactivity Alerts, Location Spoofing Detection. OTP verification is MOCKED.

campaign_management.details: Admin can create campaigns with prefix-based coupon codes (e.g., MUM001-MUM050). Sold/available counts displayed correctly.

coupon_sale_flow.details: 4-step flow: Enter code → Validate → Capture photo/details → Confirm. GPS accuracy >100m rejected.

worker_ledger.details: Auto-updates with sale amount. Shows total_coupons_sold, total_revenue, total_advances, total_expenses, net_payable.

expense_module.details: Workers can submit expenses. Photo mandatory for >₹100. Admin can approve/reject.

admin_worker_control.details: Create/disable/enable/reset password/delete workers. Add advance payments.

inactivity_tracking.details: API returns inactivity alerts. Background task runs but may not have triggered alerts in test env.

location_spoofing_detection.details: GPS accuracy >100m rejected. Impossible travel (>50km in <10 mins) flagged.

area_management.details: Areas can be created with city/state. Analytics available.
